blocker.description: Forward chain P-step cannot be proven without additional infrastructure. The forward chain construction (successor_deferral_seed) does not include pastDeferralDisjunctions, so P-step is not guaranteed by construction.
blocker.counter_example: H(neg phi) in u implies P(phi) not in u and phi not in u (by temp_t_past), but the successor v can have phi in v (not blocked by seed) and hence P(phi) in v (by reflexivity). This violates P-step.
resolution_options: Add past analog of temp_a axiom: phi -> H(F(phi))
Modify forward chain construction to include P-blocking formulas
Use full CanonicalMCS domain with canonicalMCS_backward_P

verification.failure_reason: P-step sorry remains at SuccChainFMCS.lean:~365 (forward chain case)

review_reason: Mathematical blocker discovered: P-step for forward chain cannot be proven without additional axioms or modified construction
